evals.prompt: Generate release notes for SkiaSharp comparing v3.116.1 and v3.119.0. I need both marketing slides and a detailed changelog.
evals.expected_output: Should diff two stable tags across a major range. Should find: LoongArch64 support (#3198), RISC-V64 support (#3192), Direct3D on Windows (#2823), Alpine clang-cross (#3200), SKImage.FromPicture fix (#3231), Vulkan Memory Allocator update (#3196), fontconfig update (#3221), tvOS fixes (#3186, #3199), Linux ARM/GL improvements (#3189, #3190, #3209). Should produce JSON + HTML + marketing slides + detailed changelog.
expectations: Produces a JSON file that passes validate-release-notes.py with exit code 0
Produces an HTML viewer file via render-release-notes.py
JSON meta.schemaVersion is '1.0'
JSON meta.refFrom is 'v3.116.1'
JSON meta.refTo is 'v3.119.0'
JSON meta.commitCount is greater than 10
JSON findings array has at least 8 findings
JSON summary.totalFindings equals the actual length of the findings array
At least one finding mentions LoongArch64 with changeType 'platform' or 'added'
At least one finding mentions RISC-V or riscv64 with changeType 'platform' or 'added'
At least one finding mentions Direct3D or D3D with changeType 'added'
At least one finding mentions SKImage.FromPicture with changeType 'fixed'
At least one finding mentions Vulkan Memory Allocator with changeType 'dependency'
JSON slides field is non-empty and contains emoji bullet points
JSON changelog field is non-empty and contains PR references (#NNNN)
Changelog includes a 'Breaking Changes' section (even if 'None')
Marketing slides group items by theme, not by PR number

evals.prompt: What changed between v3.119.1 and v3.119.2? I want to see what went into the security hardening release.
evals.expected_output: Narrow diff of a security-focused release. Should find: Control Flow Guard (#3397), BufferSecurityCheck (#3404), Spectre mitigations (#3496, #3497, #3502, #3503), Android symbols preservation (#3374). Many commits are CI/docs/versioning and should be filtered out or marked as 'patch' importance.
expectations: Produces a JSON file that passes validate-release-notes.py with exit code 0
Produces an HTML viewer file via render-release-notes.py
JSON meta.refFrom is 'v3.119.1'
JSON meta.refTo is 'v3.119.2'
At least one finding mentions Control Flow Guard or CFG with labels including 'security'
At least one finding mentions Spectre with labels including 'security'
At least one finding mentions BufferSecurityCheck with labels including 'security'
JSON findings array has at least 3 findings
JSON slides field mentions security hardening
Changelog groups security items together
Version bump commits are not listed as separate findings

evals.prompt: Can you generate release notes for just the changes in PR #3231? I want to document what that specific fix changed.
evals.expected_output: Should handle a single-PR scope. May diff the merge base of the PR or look at just that commit. Should find: SKImage.FromPicture fix, the affected method, what was wrong and how it was fixed. Focused output with 1-2 findings.
expectations: Produces a JSON file that passes validate-release-notes.py with exit code 0
JSON findings array has at least 1 finding
At least one finding mentions SKImage.FromPicture
At least one finding has changeType 'fixed'
JSON slides field is non-empty
JSON changelog field is non-empty
